meta.title: Mohamed Magdy Elkomy — Front-End Developer
meta.description: Front-End Developer crafting refined, performant web experiences with React.js.

hero.name: Mohamed Magdy Elkomy
hero.intro: Shipping production React apps at <1>{{company}}</1> for clients across MENA. Specialized in internationalization, RTL interfaces, performance optimization, and design-system thinking — production code that scales.

stats.title: By the numbers
stats.subtitle: A snapshot of where I am today

about.title: Engineering meets craft
about.p1: Front-End Developer based in Cairo, working primarily with React, Vite, and TypeScript. Computer Science graduate from MTI with foundations spanning embedded systems, machine learning, and mobile development before settling into the frontend.
about.p2: At <1>{{company}}</1>, I ship client-facing React applications across e-commerce, SaaS, education, and B2B verticals. Comfortable inheriting messy codebases, refactoring at scale, and building greenfield products with a focus on internationalization, RTL, and performance.
about.p3: Recent work includes overhauling a 9-language tourism platform, building a premium beauty marketplace landing page, and shipping a feature-rich e-commerce storefront with Redux Toolkit, while owning architecture and code quality end to end.
